questions.question: Explain the unique challenges of managing software projects compared to other types of projects.
expectedPoints: Intangibility - cannot see or touch software
Conformity - must adapt to existing systems

questions.question: Compare Fixed Price and Time & Materials contracts in terms of risk distribution.
expectedPoints: Fixed Price: Seller bears risk of cost overruns
Time & Materials: Buyer bears risk of scope creep
Fixed Price better for well-defined scope
